classifications.phrase: increase the cash rate target by 25 basis points
begin withdrawing some of the extraordinary monetary support
inflation has picked up more quickly, and to a higher level, than was expected
appropriate to start the process of normalising monetary conditions
unemployment rate declining over recent months to 4 per cent
Inflation has picked up significantly and by more than expected
wages growth has been picking up
some withdrawal of the extraordinary monetary support provided through the pandemic is appropriate
This will require a further lift in interest rates over the period ahead

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance through rate increases, withdrawal of pandemic support, and explicit acknowledgment of inflation exceeding expectations and wages growth acceleration, indicating commitment to further tightening.
